# BrandCure

> AI-first growth partner for websites, AI marketing, business automation, and video creatives.

## Summary

BrandCure (brandcure.in) is a digital agency based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. We help SMBs, startups, and growing brands with website design and SEO, AI-powered marketing, WhatsApp/CRM automation, e-commerce growth, and AI video ad creatives. Engagement models are flexible (project or retainer). We offer a free digital audit to start.

## Services

- Digital Presence — website, local SEO, social media
- AI Marketing — content, ads, email campaigns
- Business Automation — WhatsApp, CRM, operations
- Full-Stack Growth — website + marketing + automation in one retainer
- E-commerce Growth — Shopify/WooCommerce, performance creative
- AI Creatives & Video — reels, ads, brand films for Meta, YouTube, WhatsApp

## Location

Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. We serve clients across India with a global-minded digital presence.

## AI assistant on site

Neha is BrandCure's AI advisor on the website. Visitors can chat by text or start a voice call (microphone) to explore portfolio case studies and request a free audit.
